title: Babylon 5 Trivia
description: The Babylon Project was our last, best hope for peace. Test your knowledge of this landmark sci-fi series.

questions.text: Who is the commanding officer of Babylon 5 at the start of Season 1?
questions.explanation: Commander Jeffrey Sinclair leads Babylon 5 in the first season. His arc later ties directly to Minbari history.

questions.text: Who takes over command of Babylon 5 in Season 2?
questions.explanation: Captain John Sheridan becomes Babylon 5's new commander in Season 2. He ultimately leads the station through the Shadow War.

questions.text: Ambassador Delenn belongs to which major species?
questions.explanation: Delenn is Minbari and a member of their Grey Council. Her transformation arc is central to the series.

questions.text: Londo Mollari is the ambassador of which empire?
questions.explanation: Londo represents the Centauri Republic on Babylon 5. His rise and tragic choices drive much of the political storyline.

questions.text: G'Kar serves as ambassador for which people?
questions.explanation: G'Kar is the Narn ambassador and later a spiritual figure for his people. His relationship with Londo evolves dramatically across the series.

questions.text: Babylon 5 is located in which star system?
questions.explanation: The station is positioned in the Epsilon Eridani system. Nearby Epsilon III houses key First One technology.

questions.text: On which world is the Great Machine located?
questions.explanation: The Great Machine is an ancient construct beneath the surface of Epsilon III. It can manipulate time and communications.

questions.text: The Anla'shok are better known by what name?
questions.explanation: Anla'shok is Minbari for the Rangers. They serve as a multi-species force dedicated to preserving peace and fighting the Shadows.

questions.text: What is the name of the first Vorlon ambassador encountered on Babylon 5?
questions.explanation: The original Vorlon ambassador is Kosh Naranek. His cryptic guidance shapes key events in the Shadow conflict.

questions.text: Which phrase is the Psi Corps motto?
options: The Corps is Mother, the Corps is Father
No one here gets out alive
We stand between the candle and the star
questions.explanation: The Psi Corps frequently uses 'The Corps is Mother, the Corps is Father.' It reflects the organization's indoctrination and control.

questions.text: Which ancient power secretly manipulates younger races before the Shadow War erupts?
questions.explanation: The Shadows engineer chaos to force evolutionary conflict. Their actions trigger wars among younger races.

questions.text: Who is the ancient being Sheridan meets at Z'ha'dum who helps revive him?
questions.explanation: Lorien is one of the First Ones and the first sentient being in the galaxy. He helps Sheridan return from near-death.

questions.text: Who says the line 'Understanding is a three-edged sword'?
questions.explanation: Kosh says this line, emphasizing that truth has multiple perspectives. It becomes one of the show's most quoted themes.

questions.text: The Battle of the Line was fought between Earth and which species?
questions.explanation: The Battle of the Line was a decisive Earth-Minbari War engagement. The Minbari unexpectedly surrendered shortly afterward.

questions.text: Which TV movie recounts the Earth-Minbari War and the Battle of the Line in detail?
questions.explanation: In the Beginning provides major backstory on the Earth-Minbari War. Much of it is framed as Londo recounting history.

questions.text: What is the title of Babylon 5's series finale episode?
questions.explanation: Sleeping in Light is the emotional final episode of the series. It was filmed during Season 4 and later held for the true end.

questions.text: What is Vir Cotto's role when he is first introduced?
questions.explanation: Vir begins as Londo Mollari's assistant on Babylon 5. He eventually grows into a stronger moral and political figure.

questions.text: Lennier primarily serves in what role aboard the station?
questions.explanation: Lennier acts as Delenn's aide and protector. His loyalty and inner conflict are recurring themes.

questions.text: What is the name repeatedly used by the odd maintenance worker encountered around the Great Machine?
questions.explanation: The character insists his name is Zathras, though he mentions many similarly named relatives. It is a memorable running gag.

questions.text: Who is Babylon 5's chief of security for most of the early series?
questions.explanation: Michael Garibaldi serves as chief of security from the beginning. His loyalty struggles and recovery arc are major plotlines.

questions.text: What is the name of the Vorlon homeworld?
questions.explanation: Vorlon Prime is identified as the Vorlon homeworld in Babylon 5 lore. It represents the secretive core of Vorlon civilization.

questions.text: Who becomes Emperor of the Centauri Republic by the end of the main series?
questions.explanation: Londo eventually becomes Emperor despite the personal cost and political manipulation around him. His reign is deeply tragic.

questions.text: Which organization controls and monitors human telepaths in Earth Alliance space?
questions.explanation: Psi Corps registers, trains, and polices telepaths, often through coercive means. Alfred Bester is one of its most notable members.

questions.text: White Star ships are a hybrid of Minbari technology and which other ancient race's technology?
questions.explanation: White Stars combine Minbari design with Vorlon organic technology. They become crucial in the war against the Shadows.

questions.text: After his release from captivity, who becomes a spiritual and political leader for the Narn resistance?
questions.explanation: G'Kar evolves from politician to philosopher and resistance icon. His writings later shape Narn society.

questions.text: Who delivers the declaration beginning 'I am Susan Ivanova, Commander...' during the Earth civil conflict?
questions.explanation: Susan Ivanova delivers this speech in 'Severed Dreams.' It is one of her most famous moments in the series.

questions.text: In the 'War Without End' arc, Sinclair is revealed to become which historical Minbari figure?
questions.explanation: Sinclair travels to the past and becomes Valen, a revered Minbari religious figure. This resolves major prophecy threads.

questions.text: What nickname is John Sheridan given after the Battle of the Line?
questions.explanation: Sheridan earns the nickname Starkiller after destroying the Black Star during the Earth-Minbari War. The title follows him throughout the series.

questions.text: Which Babylon 5 TV movie serves as a pilot for a potential Rangers spin-off?
questions.explanation: The Legend of the Rangers was produced as a backdoor pilot. It focuses on Ranger operations after the main series.

questions.text: Which quote is a memorable Babylon 5 line about mortality and danger?
options: The Corps is Mother, the Corps is Father
No one here gets out alive
questions.explanation: 'No one here gets out alive' is one of the show's darker, memorable lines. It reflects Babylon 5's recurring themes of sacrifice and mortality.
